title: Sayeria dendrocolloides
taxonomy: Sayeria dendrocolloides is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Sayeria, which is a group of flowering plants within the family Rubiaceae. The classification of Sayeria dendrocolloides places it in the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. Further classification puts it in the order Gentianales, followed by the family Rubiaceae and then the genus Sayeria. At the species level, it is classified as Sayeria dendrocolloides.
